title: AN ACT DECLARING MARCH TWO OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO

chunks.text:
H. NO. 22814 / 88 OG No. 19, 2722 (May 11, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7283, March 24, 1992 ]

AN ACT DECLARING MARCH TWO OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In order to honor the memory of the late Tomas Confesor as a model Filipino citizen and inspiration of our people, March Two of every year is hereby declared as a special working holiday in the whole province of Iloilo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 2, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 24, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
